description:
Join celebrating International Day of Yoga - 2018 on 17-Jun-2018 at Museumplein, Amsterdam.

Amsterdam to witness largest ever celebration of International Yoga Day in the Netherlands on Sunday, June 17, 2018.

Attractions include yoga sessions, laughter yoga, vegetarian & vegan food, nonalcoholic beverages, instrumental music, Indian Music and more.

Join us by Live Stream in Celebrating International Day of Yoga Amsterdam 2018
fulltitle: International Day of Yoga Amsterdam 2018 Live Stream
